channel.title: Health
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Health, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sycophantic AI flatters and suggests you are not to blame
item.description: The AI models and chatbots that we interact with tend to affirm our feelings and viewpoints â more so than people do, with potentially worrisome conse...

item.title: Two startlingly different views on long-awaited data on America's anti-HIV efforts
item.description: After a year without data, the State Department released figures on PEPFAR, the program launched by George W. Bush and credited with saving millions o...

item.title: Researchers Analyzed 450k Diets â This Eating Habit Stood Out For Cancer Prevention
item.description: Yet another benefit of this eating pattern

item.title: Nearly 70% Of Americans Are Deficient In This Mineral & Blood Tests Miss It
item.description: Plus, four tips to fix it.

item.title: How Women Can Prevent Injury While Weightlifting In Their 40s & Beyond
item.description: Because certain fractures become much more common in perimenopause.

item.title: In Need Of Sun, Rest & Relaxation? (Who Isn't?) Try This Hotspot
item.description: Welcome to Playa del Carmen, Mexico's premier resort destination, located in the heart of the Riviera Maya.

item.title: Wish You Could Fall Asleep In Seconds? This May Change Your Mind
item.description: One of the most common sleep myths...busted.

item.title: Restrictions on obesity drug coverage force patients to pivot
item.description: Twelve million people lost coverage for Zepbound over the last year. The same number of people lost coverage for Wegovy, according to an analysis by G...

item.title: Trump administration delays rule aimed at improving disability access in schools
item.description: Schools, colleges and other public institutions originally had until this week to make online content accessible to people with disabilities. Now, the...

item.title: Gene therapy for a rare type of deafness shows lasting results
item.description: Researchers say a gene therapy allowed deaf children and adults as old as 32 to hear for the first time. The benefits have persisted for more than two...
